flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Greenville University fell 25% between 2021 and 2024 (44.6% → 33.5%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Greenville University fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (48.5% → 39.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Greenville University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Greenville University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (828 → 955).
